```{r, warnings=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

```


```{r}
source("emileRegs.R")
```




# Data  


```{r}
data <- read_stata("raw data/DATA_hurricane_mortality_temp_month_state_19302015.dta")
data$month_year <- paste0(data$year, sprintf("%02d", data$month))
data$month_state <- paste0(data$month, "_", data$state_abbrev)

```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}


irf <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data,
  outcome = "dths_tot_pop",
  main_var = "maxs",
  controls = "tavg:as.factor(stfips) + tavg^2:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate:as.factor(stfips) + modate^2:as.factor(stfips) + modate^3:as.factor(stfips) + modate^4:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate^5:as.factor(stfips) + modate^6:as.factor(stfips) + modate^7:as.factor(stfips) + modate^8:as.factor(stfips) ",
  lags = 0:240,
  fe = "stfips + month_state ",
  panel_id = c("stfips", "month_year"),
  vcov_formula = "iid",
  shock_label = "Max Wind Speed"
)


# --- Plot ---
ggplot(irf, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1,color=myred) +
  #geom_point(size = 2,color=myred) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), color=NA,fill=myred,alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #add 0 line
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Lag (negative = leads)",
    y = "Cumulative effect of maxwind_diff"
  )
```



```{r}
myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
```

# Data Barrage

```{r}
make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1970,
  baseline_end   = 2014,
  controls = NULL,
  threshold_level = c("global", "country"),
  scale_var = FALSE,
  filter = NULL
) {

  threshold_level <- match.arg(threshold_level)

  data <- data %>% dplyr::mutate(.row_id = dplyr::row_number(), year = as.integer(year))

  if (!is.null(filter)) {
    data_filt <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!!filter)
    filter_suffix <- "_filter"
  } else {
    data_filt <- data
    filter_suffix <- ""
  }

  rhs <- if (!is.null(controls)) paste(controls) else "1"

  suffix_parts <- c()
  if (!is.null(controls)) suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, controls)
  if (threshold_level == "country") suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "country")
  if (scale_var) suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "varweight")

  suffix <- if (length(suffix_parts) > 0) {
    paste0("_", paste(suffix_parts, collapse = "_"))
  } else {
    ""
  }

  suffix <- paste0(suffix, filter_suffix)

  formula_fe <- as.formula(paste(var, "~", rhs, "| countrycode[year] + year"))
  fe_model <- feols(formula_fe, data = data_filt)

  shock_name         <- paste0(var, "_shock", suffix)
  treat_name         <- paste0(var, "_treat", suffix)
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever", suffix)
  first_treat_name   <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year", suffix)
  thresh_name        <- paste0(var, "_shock_p", suffix)

  resid_df <- data_filt %>%
    dplyr::select(.row_id) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(!!shock_name := resid(fe_model))

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::left_join(resid_df, by = ".row_id")

  if (scale_var) {
    data <- data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        !!shock_name := if_else(
          !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]),
          .data[[shock_name]] / sd(.data[[shock_name]], na.rm = TRUE),
          NA_real_
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  data_filt <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[shock_name]]))

  if (threshold_level == "global") {
    global_thresh <- quantile(
      data_filt[[shock_name]][
        data_filt$year >= baseline_start &
        data_filt$year <= baseline_end
      ],
      p, na.rm = TRUE
    )
    data[[thresh_name]] <- global_thresh
  } else {
    data <- data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        !!thresh_name := quantile(
          .data[[shock_name]][
            !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]) &
              .data$year >= baseline_start &
              .data$year <= baseline_end
          ],
          p, na.rm = TRUE
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!treat_name         := NA_integer_,
      !!treat_forever_name := NA_integer_,
      !!first_treat_name   := NA_real_,
      !!thresh_name        := if_else(!is.na(.data[[shock_name]]), .data[[thresh_name]], NA_real_)
    )

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!treat_name := if_else(
        !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]) & !is.na(.data[[thresh_name]]),
        if_else(
          .data[[shock_name]] >= .data[[thresh_name]] & .data[[var]] > 0,
          1L, 0L
        ),
        NA_integer_
      ),
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        min(.data$year[!is.na(.data[[treat_name]]) & .data[[treat_name]] == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
        NA_real_
      ),
      !!treat_forever_name := if_else(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) & .data$year >= .data[[first_treat_name]],
        1L, 0L, missing = NA_integer_
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  data$.row_id <- NULL

  return(data)
}
```




```{r}
pwt <- read_stata("raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs <- read_stata("raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
wdi <- read_stata("raw_data/wdi_clean_2018.dta")
data <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode")) %>%
  left_join(wdi, by = c("year", "countrycode"))
knot_to_ms = 0.514444
data$energy_sqkm <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$energy <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_knots <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm_knots <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$avgwind <- data$avg_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$nlands <- data$sum_a_lands_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$nlands_sqkm <- data$sum_a_lands_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data %>%  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    hc_diff = hc - lag(hc),
    maxwind_sqkm_diff = maxwind_sqkm - lag(maxwind_sqkm),
    maxwind_diff = maxwind - lag(maxwind),
    nlands_diff = nlands - lag(nlands),
    l0_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l0_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l1_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l1_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l2_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l2_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l3_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l3_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l4_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l4_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l5_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l5_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l0_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l0_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l1_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l1_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l2_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l2_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l3_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l3_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l4_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l4_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l5_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5),
    l5_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5)
    
    ) %>% 
  ungroup() -> data


data$continent <- countrycode(data$countrycode,
                                 origin = "iso3c",
                                 destination = "continent")

data_tc <- data %>%
  mutate(
    treat = as.integer(maxwind > 0),
    treatstorm = as.integer(maxwind >= 34),
    treathurricane = as.integer(maxwind >= 64),
    #create category factors for hurricances
    category = ifelse(maxwind < 18, "No Storm",
                      ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                             ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 43, "Category 1",
                                    ifelse(maxwind >= 43 & maxwind < 50, "Category 2",
                                           ifelse(maxwind >= 50 & maxwind < 58, "Category 3",
                                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 58 & maxwind < 70, "Category 4",
                                                         "Category 5")))))),
    categorybin = ifelse(maxwind >= 49, "Category 3-5",
                           ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 49, "Category 1-2",
                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                                         "No Storm"))),
    
    loggdp = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp = real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2 = year^2,
    year3 = year^3,
    year4 = year^4,
    maxwind1 = maxwind,
    maxwind2 = maxwind^2,
    maxwind3 = maxwind^3,
    maxwind_diff1 = maxwind_diff,
    maxwind_diff2 = maxwind_diff^2,
    maxwind_diff3 = maxwind_diff^3,
    nland_diff1 = nlands_diff,
    nland_diff2 = nlands_diff^2,
    nland_diff3 = nlands_diff^3,

    period = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"),
    period90 = case_when(year <=1990 ~'Pre',
                        year >1990 ~'Post'),
     period91 = case_when(year <=1991 ~'Pre',
                        year >1991 ~'Post'),
    period89 = case_when(year <=1989 ~'Pre',
                        year >1989 ~'Post'),
    period92 = case_when(year <=1992 ~'Pre',
                        year >1992 ~'Post'),
    period88 = case_when(year <=1988 ~'Pre',
                        year >1988 ~'Post'),
    decade = case_when(
      year >= 1970 & year < 1980 ~ "1970s",
      year >= 1980 & year < 1990 ~ "1980s",
      year >= 1990 & year < 2000 ~ "1990s",
      year >= 2000 & year < 2010 ~ "2000s",
      year >= 2010 & year < 2020 ~ "2010s",
    ),
    period3 = case_when(
      year < 1985 ~ "1970-1984",
      year >= 1985 & year < 2000 ~ "1985-1999",
      year >= 2000 ~ "2000-2014"
    )
    
  ) %>% filter(year>=1969)

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  # compute country-level averages over 2000–2010
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    credit_avg = mean(domestic_credit[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE),
    gdp_pc_avg = mean(real_gdp_usd_pc[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # bin based on averages
  mutate(
    credit_bin = factor(
      ntile(credit_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("q1", "q2", "q3")
    ),
    gdp_pc_bin = factor(
      ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("bottom 1/3", "middle", "top 1/3")
    ),
    # create deciles for GDP per capita
    gdp_pc_decile = ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 5),
    gdp_pc_group = case_when(
      gdp_pc_decile == 1 ~ "bottom 1/5",
      gdp_pc_decile == 5 ~ "top 1/5",
      TRUE ~ "middle"
    )
  )

######### SHOCKs

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  #group_by(countrycode) %>%
  
  # Compute country-specific 95th percentiles over 1970-1990
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p95  = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_p95  = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    maxwind_sqkm_p95 = quantile(maxwind_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sqkm_p95  = quantile(nlands_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sqkm_p95  = quantile(energy_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_p90 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # Build indicators, but only assign 1 if percentile > 0
  mutate(
    maxwind_95      = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind      >= maxwind_p95),
    nlands_95       = as.integer(nlands_p95  > 0 & nlands       >= nlands_p95),
    energy_95       = as.integer(energy_p95  > 0 & energy       >= energy_p95),
    maxwind_sqkm_95 = as.integer(maxwind_sqkm_p95 > 0 & maxwind_sqkm >= maxwind_sqkm_p95),
    nlands_sqkm_95  = as.integer(nlands_sqkm_p95  > 0 & nlands_sqkm  >= nlands_sqkm_p95),
    energy_sqkm_95  = as.integer(energy_sqkm_p95  > 0 & energy_sqkm  >= energy_sqkm_p95),
    maxwind_90      = as.integer(maxwind_p90 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p90),
    # Physical thresholds
    wind_10ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 10),
    wind_21ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 21),
    wind_ts = as.integer(maxwind >= 18),
    wind_cat1 = as.integer(maxwind >= 33),
    wind_cat2 = as.integer(maxwind >= 43),
    wind_cat3 = as.integer(maxwind >= 50)
  )




data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  make_shock("maxwind") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("energy") %>%
  make_shock("energy_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("nlands") %>%
  make_shock("nlands_sqkm") %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979)) %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979), scale_var = TRUE) %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979), threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979)) 





# add tfp
alpha <- 0.33
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    ln_hc          = log(hc),
    ln_rkna        = log(rkna),
    ln_pop         = log(pop),
    ln_real_gdp_usd = log(real_gdp_usd),
    ln_tfp  = ln_real_gdp_usd - (alpha * ln_rkna) - (1 - alpha) * (ln_hc + ln_pop)
  )

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_treat_past3 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-3):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past5 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-5):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past2 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-2):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past7 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-7):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past10 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-10):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past15 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-15):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past20 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-20):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer()
    
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_treat_year = ifelse(maxwind_treat == 1, year, NA_integer_),
    prev_treat_year = zoo::na.locf(prev_treat_year, na.rm = FALSE),
    prev_treat_year = lag(prev_treat_year),   # force "previous", not current
    time_to_last = ifelse(
      maxwind_treat == 1 & !is.na(prev_treat_year),
      year - prev_treat_year,
      0L),
    ttl_bin = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 3 ~ "1-3",
      time_to_last > 3 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "3-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 7 ~ "5-7",
      time_to_last > 7 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "7-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
    ),
      ttl_bin2 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
     ),
      ttl_bin3 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 ~ "10+"
     ),
    ttl_bin5 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 & time_to_last <= 25 ~ "20-25",
      time_to_last > 25 ~ "25+"
     )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```

# B&B2025 replication

```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m4 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m6 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6, replace=TRUE,
       digits=3, dict = c("nlands_sqkm" = "Landfalls (sqkm)",
                "maxwind_sqkm_knots" = "Max Wind (sqkm)",
                "domestic_credit" = "Domestic Credit",
                "l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)" = "Lagged GDP per Capita"),
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, file = "tables/bb2025_replication_tab1.tex")
etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))

```

```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff*100 ~ l(maxwind_shock,0:5)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff*100 ~ l(maxwind_shock_filter,0:5)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
years <- sort(unique(data_tc$year))

vars <- c("nlands_sqkm", 
          "maxwind_sqkm",
          "nlands", "maxwind",
          "maxwind_sqkm_treat", "maxwind_treat",
          "maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter")

run_loyo <- function(varname) {
  
  formula_full <- as.formula(
    paste0("gdp_diff ~ ", varname, 
           " | year + countrycode[year]")
  )
  
  # Full sample model
  m_full <- feols(
    formula_full,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    cluster = ~countrycode
  )
  
  full_beta <- coef(m_full)[varname]
  full_se   <- se(m_full)[varname]
  
  full_ci_low  <- full_beta - 1.96 * full_se
  full_ci_high <- full_beta + 1.96 * full_se
  
  # LOYO coefficients only
  loyo <- map_dfr(years, function(y_drop) {
    
    m <- feols(
      formula_full,
      data = data_tc %>% filter(year != y_drop),
      panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      cluster = ~countrycode
    )
    
    tibble(
      variable = varname,
      dropped_year = y_drop,
      beta = coef(m)[varname]
    )
  })
  
  # Add constant full-sample info
  loyo %>%
    mutate(
      full_beta = full_beta,
      full_ci_low = full_ci_low,
      full_ci_high = full_ci_high
    )
}

loyo_results <- map_dfr(vars, run_loyo)
loyo_results <- loyo_results %>%
  mutate(
    within_ci = beta >= full_ci_low & beta <= full_ci_high
  )


ggplot(loyo_results, 
       aes(x = dropped_year, y = beta)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = full_ci_low, ymax = full_ci_high),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = full_beta),
             linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "red") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  #add dash at 1980
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1980, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Leave-One-Year-Out Sensitivity",
    x = "Dropped Year",
    y = "Coefficient"
  )
ggsave("figures/bb_detective/loyo_sensitivity.png", width = 8, height = 5)

```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
vars <- c("nlands_sqkm", 
          "maxwind_sqkm",
          "nlands", "maxwind",
          "maxwind_sqkm_treat", "maxwind_treat",
          "maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter",
          "maxwind_treat_varweight", "maxwind_treat_country")

run_loco <- function(varname) {
  
  formula_full <- as.formula(
    paste0("gdp_diff ~ ", varname, 
           " | year + countrycode[year]")
  )
  
  # ----- Full sample model -----
  m_full <- feols(
    formula_full,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    cluster = ~countrycode
  )
  
  full_beta <- coef(m_full)[varname]
  full_se   <- se(m_full)[varname]
  
  full_ci_low  <- full_beta - 1.96 * full_se
  full_ci_high <- full_beta + 1.96 * full_se
  
  # ----- Leave-one-country-out -----
  loco <- map_dfr(countries, function(cc_drop) {
    
    m <- feols(
      formula_full,
      data = data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != cc_drop),
      panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      cluster = ~countrycode
    )
    
    tibble(
      variable = varname,
      dropped_country = cc_drop,
      beta = coef(m)[varname]
    )
  })
  
  loco %>%
    mutate(
      full_beta = full_beta,
      full_ci_low = full_ci_low,
      full_ci_high = full_ci_high
    )
}

countries <- unique(data_tc$countrycode)
loco_results <- map_dfr(vars, run_loco)
#add if beta is within full ci
loco_results <- loco_results %>%
  mutate(
    within_ci = beta >= full_ci_low & beta <= full_ci_high
  )

ggplot(loco_results, 
       aes(x = dropped_country, y = beta)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = full_ci_low, ymax = full_ci_high),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = full_beta),
             linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "red") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y",ncol=5) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Leave-One-Country-Out Sensitivity",
    x = "Dropped Country",
    y = "Coefficient"
  )

ggsave("figures/bb_detective/loco_sensitivity.png",  dpi=300)
```



```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m4 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m6 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6, replace=TRUE,
       digits=3, dict = c("nlands_sqkm" = "Landfalls (sqkm)",
                "maxwind_sqkm_knots" = "Max Wind (sqkm)",
                "domestic_credit" = "Domestic Credit",
                "l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)" = "Lagged GDP per Capita"),
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, file = "tables/bb2025_tab1_post80.tex")
etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))

```





```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,nlands_sqkm)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,nlands_sqkm)*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,nlands_sqkm)*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m4 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,maxwind_sqkm_knots)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,maxwind_sqkm_knots)*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m6 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ i(period,maxwind_sqkm_knots)*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       dict = c("i(period,nlands_sqkm)" = "Landfalls (sqkm) × Period",
                "i(period,maxwind_sqkm_knots)" = "Max Wind (sqkm) × Period",
                "nlands_sqkm" = "Landfalls (sqkm)",
                "maxwind_sqkm_knots" = "Max Wind (sqkm)"),
       
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, file = "tables/bb2025_extensiontab1.tex")
etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))

```

```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  ln_tfp ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m2 <- feols(
  ln_tfp ~ l(maxwind_sqkm_knots,0:1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  ln_tfp ~ l(maxwind_sqkm_knots,0:2)| year + countrycode[year],

  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m4 <- feols(
  ln_tfp ~ l(maxwind_sqkm_knots,0:3)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  ln_tfp ~ l(maxwind_sqkm_knots,0:4)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2, m3,m4,m5,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, digits = 3, replace=TRUE,
       file = "tables/bb2025_tab2.tex")

etable(m1, m2, m3,m4,m5,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))
```

```{r}
models <- list(
  m1 = m1, m2 = m2,
  m3 = m3, m4 = m4,
  m5 = m5, m6 = m6
)

legend("topright",lty=1:2,col=1:2,
       legend = c("1970-2014", "1980-2014"))
```

# DIAGNOSTICS



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
years  <- sort(unique(data_tc$year))

shocks <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter",
            "maxwind_sqkm", "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter")
irfs_loyo <- map_dfr(years, function(y) {
  
  data_loo <- data_tc %>% filter(year != y)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_loo,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock   = shk,
        loo_year = y
      )
  })
})

#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock   = shk,
      loo_year = "Full Sample"
    )
})

#rename _filter to _post80 for better labels
irfs_loyo <- irfs_loyo %>%
  mutate(
    shock = case_when(
      shock == "maxwind_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_shock_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_treat_filter" ~ "maxwind_treat_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_sqkm_shock_post80",
      TRUE ~ shock
    ))
#same for full sample
irfs_full <- irfs_full %>%
  mutate(
    shock = case_when(
      shock == "maxwind_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_shock_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_treat_filter" ~ "maxwind_treat_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_sqkm_shock_post80",
      TRUE ~ shock
    ))

ggplot(irfs_loyo, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = loo_year)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(horizon, irf_mean), color = "cornflowerblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), fill = "cornflowerblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-Year-Out"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))
ggsave("figures/bb_detective/loyo_irfs.png", dpi=300)
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
countries  <- sort(unique(data_tc$countrycode))
shocks <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter",
            "maxwind_sqkm", "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter")
irfs_loco <- map_dfr(countries, function(cc) {
  
  data_loco <- data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != cc)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_loco,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock   = shk,
        loco_country = cc
      )
  })
})


#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock   = shk,
      loco_country = "Full Sample")
})

irfs_loco <- irfs_loco %>%
  mutate(
    shock = case_when(
      shock == "maxwind_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_shock_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_treat_filter" ~ "maxwind_treat_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_sqkm_shock_post80",
      TRUE ~ shock
    ))

irfs_full <- irfs_full %>%
  mutate(
    shock = case_when(
      shock == "maxwind_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_shock_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_treat_filter" ~ "maxwind_treat_post80",
      shock == "maxwind_sqkm_shock_filter" ~ "maxwind_sqkm_shock_post80",
      TRUE ~ shock
    ))

ggplot(irfs_loco, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = loco_country)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(horizon, irf_mean), color = "cornflowerblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), fill = "cornflowerblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-Country-Out"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))
ggsave("figures/bb_detective/loco_irfs.png", dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
#print number of countries per shock in irf_loco
irfs_loco %>%
  group_by(shock) %>%
  summarise(n_countries = n_distinct(loco_country))

```



```{r, message=FALSE}
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    year_block = paste0(
      floor((year - 1969) / 5) * 5 + 1969,
      "-",
      floor((year - 1969) / 5) * 5 + 1973
    )
  )

blocks <- sort(unique(data_tc$year_block))

shocks <- c(
  "maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter",
  "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter"
)

irfs_lobo <- map_dfr(blocks, function(bk) {
  
  data_lobo <- data_tc %>% filter(year_block != bk)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data         = data_lobo,
      outcome      = "loggdp",
      main_var     = shk,
      horizon      = 10,
      controls     = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe           = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id     = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock       = shk,
        left_block  = bk
      )
  })
})

#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = "loggdp",
    main_var     = shk,
    horizon      = 10,
    controls     = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe           = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id     = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock       = shk,
      left_block  = "Full Sample"
    )
})

ggplot(irfs_lobo, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = left_block)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_full,
    aes(horizon, irf_mean),
    color = "cornflowerblue",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irfs_full,
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    fill = "cornflowerblue",
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-5-Year-Period-Out IRFs"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))
```




```{r}
m1 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,5) - l(loggdp,1) ~ maxwind_treat + l(gdp_diff,1:5) | year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m2 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,5) - l(loggdp,1) ~ maxwind_treat + l(gdp_diff,1:5)| year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>2008),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2)
```




```{r, message=FALSE}
sample_periods <- list(
  "1970-2008" = 1969:2008,
  "1995-2014" = 1994:2014,
  "1990-2014" = 1989:2014,
  "2000-2014" = 1999:2014
)

shocks <- c("maxwind", "maxwind_shock", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_shock_filter",
            "wind_cat1", "maxwind_shock_varweight")

irfs_sub <- map_dfr(names(sample_periods), function(period_name) {
  
  years_range <- sample_periods[[period_name]]
  data_sub <- data_tc %>% filter(year %in% years_range)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_sub,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1) ",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock  = shk,
        period = period_name
      )
  })
})

irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2) + l(maxwind_shock,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock  = shk,
      period = "Full Sample"
    )
})

ggplot(irfs_sub, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = period)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean),
            color = "black", linewidth = 1, linetype="dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
              fill = "dodgerblue", alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    color = "Sample Period",
    title = "IRFs Across Different Sample Periods"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


```





#  FE-DL




```{r}
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind",
  lags = 0:20,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
)

ggplot(irfs_wind_cumulative, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect",
    title = "Cumulative Distributed Lag Effects"
  )
```

```{r}
results_list <- list()

lag_specs <- list(
  "5 lags" = 0:5,
  "10 lags" = 0:10,
  "15 lags" = 0:15,
  "20 lags" = 0:20
)

for (spec_name in names(lag_specs)) {
  results_list[[spec_name]] <- cumulative_dl(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "gdp_diff",
    main_var = "maxwind_treat",
    lags = lag_specs[[spec_name]],
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
    shock_label = spec_name
  )
}

# Combine all results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list, .id = "specification")

# Plot with different specifications
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, 
                        color = specification, fill = specification)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification",
    color = "Specification",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

```





```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE}
results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  interact_var = "period",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = " GDP growth"
  ) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
ggsave("figures/irf_DL_interact_period.png", width = 5, height = 5)
```








# Treatment Analysis


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE}

df <- data_tc %>% 
  filter(maxwind > 0)

# Compute medians
meds <- df %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(median_wind = median(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
            n = n())

med1 <- round(meds$median_wind[1],1)
med2 <- round(meds$median_wind[2],1)
delta <- round(med1 - med2,1)

# Wilcoxon test
wil <- wilcox.test(maxwind ~ period, data = df)
pval <- signif(wil$p.value,1)

ggplot(df, aes(x = maxwind, fill = period)) +
  
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  
  # Median lines
  geom_vline(data = meds,
             aes(xintercept = median_wind, color = period),
             linetype = "dashed",
             size = 1) +
  
  # Annotation block
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.05,
    vjust = 1.4,
    size = 5,
    label = paste0(
      "Median diff. = ", delta,
      "\nWilcoxon p = ", pval
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Maximum Wind Speed (m/s)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
```



```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE}
top10 <- data_tc %>%
  slice_max(order_by = maxwind_shock, n = 10) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(countrycode, " (", year, ")")) %>%
  select(label, maxwind, maxwind_shock) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(maxwind_shock, maxwind),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

# Get ordering based ONLY on wind shocks
order_levels <- top10 %>%
  filter(variable == "maxwind_shock") %>%
  arrange(value) %>%
  pull(label)

top10$label <- factor(top10$label, levels = order_levels)

ggplot(top10, aes(x = label, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "m/s",
    fill = NULL,
    title = "Top 10 Wind Shocks",
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "maxwind" = "steelblue",
      "maxwind_shock" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic()

ggsave("figures/top10_wind_shocks.png", dpi=300)

```


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, warning=FALSE}

events <- tribble(
  ~countrycode, ~year, ~label,
  "USA", 2005, "Katrina",
  "USA", 1992, "Andrew",
  "PHL", 2013, "Haiyan",
  "DOM", 1979, "David",
  "JPN", 1971, "Olive"
)

countries_keep <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "DOM")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_keep & year >1969)

#print the top 3 max shock for each country and the year it occurred
tab <- df_plot %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = maxwind_shock, n = 3) %>%
  select(countrycode, year, maxwind_shock) %>%
  arrange(countrycode, desc(maxwind_shock))
print(tab)

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = year, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue",linewidth=1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  
  # vertical hurricane markers
  geom_vline(
    data = events,
    aes(xintercept = year),
    color = "firebrick",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  
  # optional labels
  geom_text(
    data = events,
    aes(x = year, y = Inf, label = label),
    angle = 0,
    vjust = 1.1,
    hjust = 0.8,
    color = "firebrick",
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ countrycode, scales = "free_y",ncol=2) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Max wind shock"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) 
ggsave("figures/maxwind_shock_time_series.png", dpi=300)
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}

plot_event_series <- function(data, var, ylab) {
  
  df <- data %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg = sum(.data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Fit linear trend
  fit <- lm(avg ~ year, data = df)
  slope <- coef(fit)[2]
  
  slope_label <- paste0(
    ifelse(slope >= 0, "+", ""),
    round(slope, 2),
    " events / year"
  )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = year, y = avg)) +
    
    # main series
    geom_line(color = myblue, linewidth = 1.2) +
    
    # linear trend
    geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "indianred",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    
    # slope annotation
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = min(df$year) + 0.05 * diff(range(df$year)),
      y = max(df$avg, na.rm = TRUE),
      label = slope_label,
      color = "indianred",
      hjust = 0,
      vjust = 1,
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    
    labs(
      x = "",
      y = ylab
    ) +
    
    # integer y-axis
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)
    ) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
    )
}

plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1970),
  var  = "maxwind_95",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_95.png", dpi = 300)
plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1970),
  var  = "maxwind_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events (residualized)"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_treat.png", dpi = 300)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1980),
  var  = "maxwind_treat_filter",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events (residualized)"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_treat_post80.png", dpi = 300)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_country",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_varweight",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)



```





```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
ggsave("figures/event_timeline.png", dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat_filter > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat_filter > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
ggsave("figures/event_timeline_post80.png", dpi = 300)
```







```{r}
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat_country > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat_country > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
ggsave("figures/event_timeline_pcountry.png", dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
  group_by(countrycode) %>%

  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------

  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)

bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_sqkm_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_sqkm_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat_varweight_filter > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat_varweight_filter > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
```



```{r}
data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()

map_data <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(
    data_tc_filtered %>%
      group_by(countrycode) %>%
      summarise(events = sum(maxwind_treat, na.rm = TRUE)),
    by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
  )

ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = events), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c (RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    limits = c(1, max(map_data$events, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# events"
  ) +
  
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  #robinson 
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
   theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_events95p.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}

# Example: fully independent control for each arrow/text
highlight_events <- tribble(
  ~countrycode, ~year, ~label, ~arrow_start_y, ~arrow_end_y, ~label_y, ~arrow_color, ~arrow_size, ~label_color, ~label_hjust,
  "USA", 2005, "USA 2005", 240, 20, 250, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", -0.,
  "PHL", 2013, "PHL 2013", 250, 20, 280, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.5,
  "JPN", 1976, "JPN 1976", 200, 20, 230, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.6
) %>%
  left_join(data_tc %>% select(countrycode, year, maxwind_shock),
            by = c("countrycode", "year"))

# Plot
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, fill = myblue, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  labs(x = "Maximum Wind Speed Shock", y = "Frequency") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
  ) +
  
  # Fully independent arrows
  geom_segment(data = highlight_events,
               aes(
                 x = maxwind_shock, xend = maxwind_shock,
                 y = arrow_start_y, yend = arrow_end_y,
                 color = arrow_color,
                 size = arrow_size
               ),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm"))
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +   # so the colors from the table are used directly
  scale_size_identity() +    # so sizes from the table are used directly

  # Fully independent labels
  geom_text(data = highlight_events,
            aes(
              x = maxwind_shock,
              y = label_y,
              label = label,
              color = label_color,
              hjust = label_hjust
            ),
            fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity()
ggsave("figures/histogram_shock_events.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
#correlation between treatment and maxwind
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Max Wind Speed", y = "Max Wind Speed Shock") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #display r and p 
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 40, label = paste0("r = ", round(cor(data_tc$maxwind, data_tc$maxwind_shock, use = "complete.obs"), 2)), hjust = 0, size=5) 
ggsave("figures/correlation_shock_maxwind.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 1 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)
ggsave("figures/shock_wind_comparison.png", dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 0.5 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)
```

```{r}
#print year of max wind for each country
data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_year = year[which.max(maxwind_shock)],
    maxwind_sqkm_year = year[which.max(maxwind_sqkm_shock)],
    maxwind_shock      = max(maxwind_shock, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_sqkm_shock = 1000*max(maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(maxwind_sqkm_shock))
```




```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
top15 <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  slice(1:15)

data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% top15$countrycode) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_events    = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(countrycode)))

p1 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = n_events, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n_events,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "steelblue",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Number of Events"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


p2 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = avg_maxwind, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = avg_maxwind,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "firebrick",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    x = "m/s",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Max Wind (average 1970-2014)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

p2 + p1 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
ggsave("figures/top15_countries.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r, message = FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
treatments <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_varweight")
irfs <- list()
for (treat in treatments) {

  irf <- lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "maxwind",
    main_var = treat,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  )
  irfs[[treat]] <- irf %>%
    mutate(treatment = treat)
}

#Plot
irfs_all <- bind_rows(irfs)
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA, fill = "dodgerblue"
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = "dodgerblue") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ treatment, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Max Wind"
  ) +
  #make x axis discrete  2x,4,6,8,10
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) 

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind.png", dpi = 300)


```







# CLEAN CONTROL
```{r}

data_cleancontrol <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

data_cc_80 <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_treat_filter == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

```

```{r}
data_plot <- data_cleancontrol %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))


label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2


country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))


ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_cleancontrol.png", dpi = 300)

```
# Treatment definitions 

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, message=FALSE}
# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_treat = "Base",
  maxwind_treat_filter = "Base (1980+)",
  maxwind_treat_varweight = "Var. weighted shock",
  maxwind_treat_varweight_filter = "Var weighted shock (1980+)",
  maxwind_treat_country = "Country Threshold",
  maxwind_treat_country_filter = "Country Threshold (1980+)"
)
  

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```


# DECADE

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight",
     "maxwind_treat_filter",
     "maxwind_treat_country_filter",
     "maxwind_treat_varweight_filter"
    
    
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock",
    "Base (1980+)",
    "Country threshold (1980+)",
    "Var. weighted shock (1980+)"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter(category!="2010s") %>%
  #remove 1970s from 80+ data
   filter(!(category == "1970s" & shock %in% c("Base (1980+)", "Country threshold (1980+)", "Var. weighted shock (1980+)")))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_decade.png", dpi = 300)

```


```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_cleancontrol,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("figures/irf_by_past_events.png", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```




# MAIN IRF


```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
shocks <- c("maxwind_95", "energy_95")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_95")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = "solid", "energy_95" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_energy.png", dpi = 300)
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_95"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
  controls     = lp_controls
)
```
