```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_periods.png", dpi = 300)

```


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
shocks <- c("maxwind_treat", "energy_treat")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + countrycode[year3] + countrycode[year4] year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_treat")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = "solid", "energy_treat" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_energy.png", dpi = 300)
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_periods.png", dpi = 300)

```

# Interact with Past treatment Dummy

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_pastyears.png", dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat_varweight"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,2:3)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin2")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red (recent / baseline)
  "1-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-10"         = "#FDAE61",
  "10-15"        = "#FEE08B",
  "15-20"        = "#A6D96A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue (old shocks)
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL# "l(gdp_diff,2:5)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+"
      )
    )
  )
greta_colors <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(4, "Spectral")[c(4,3,2,1)],
  c("No past shock", "1-5", "5-10", "10+")
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  # geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Years since last event",
    fill = "Years since last event"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2), fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)
```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-3",
        "3-5",
        "5-7",
        "7-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red
  "1-3"          = "#D73027",
  "3-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-7"          = "#FDAE61",
  "7-10"         = "#FEE08B",
  "10-15"        = "#A6D96A",
  "15-20"        = "#4DAF4A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irf_df %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf_mean < 0), min(horizon[irf_mean < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf_mean < 0) & any(irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~lp_horizon , # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
irf_recovery <- irf_recovery %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+",
        "No past shock"
      )
    )
  )


ggplot(irf_recovery, aes(x = category, y = recovery_time)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    shape = 4,              # "x" marker
    color = "steelblue",
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    group = 1,
    color = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 15)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time since last event",
    y = "Estimated recovery time (years)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
ggsave("figures/recovery_time_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)
```


# Individual IRFS



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}

mod_fstage <- feols(
  loggdp ~ 1 | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year + countrycode,
  data = data_tc
)

data_tc$loggdp_hat <- predict(mod_fstage, newdata = data_tc)
data_tc$loggdp_hat <- data_tc$loggdp - data_tc$loggdp_hat
data_tc$gdp_hat_diff <- data_tc$loggdp_hat - dplyr::lag(data_tc$loggdp_hat)


mycountry <- 'USA'
horizon <- 9

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    disaster_code = if_else(
      countrycode == mycountry & maxwind_treat == 1,
      paste0("i_", year),
      NA_character_
    )
  )


#make one column for each disaster code, with 1 if treated in that year, 0 otherwise
us_dummies <- data_tc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(countrycode, year),
    names_from = disaster_code,
    values_from = maxwind_treat,
    values_fill = list(maxwind_treat = 0)
  )

data_tc2 <- data_tc %>%
  left_join(us_dummies, by = c("countrycode", "year"))

disaster_cols <- names(us_dummies)[!(names(us_dummies) %in% c("countrycode","year","NA"))]
#remove years after 2014 - h +1
disaster_cols <- disaster_cols[as.numeric(sub("i_", "", disaster_cols)) <= 2014 - horizon ]


irfs_list <- map_dfr(disaster_cols, function(colname) {
  
  # skip if column is NA (just in case)
  if(!colname %in% names(data_tc2)) return(NULL)
  
  lp <- lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc2,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = colname,
    horizon     = horizon,
    controls    = NULL, #"l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  + year + countrycode  ",       # already residualized
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # add column info
  lp %>% mutate(disaster_code = colname)
})


# Extract the event year from disaster_code
irfs_time <- irfs_list %>%
  mutate(
    event_year = as.numeric(sub("i_", "", disaster_code)),
    cal_year = event_year + horizon  # calendar time = event year + horizon
  )


p_irf <- ggplot(irfs_time, aes(x = cal_year, y = irf_mean, color = disaster_code)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = disaster_code),
              alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "IRF",
    color = "Disaster",
    fill  = "Disaster"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# ---- Timeline of maxwind shocks ----
maxcal <- max(irfs_time$cal_year, na.rm = TRUE)
timeline_data <- data_tc2 %>%
  filter(countrycode == mycountry & maxwind_treat == 1) 

p_timeline <- ggplot(timeline_data, aes(x = year, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Maxwind Shock") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10)
  )


x_min <- min(irfs_time$cal_year, timeline_data$year, na.rm = TRUE)-1
x_max <- max(irfs_time$cal_year, timeline_data$year, na.rm = TRUE)
x_breaks <- seq(x_min, x_max, by = 5)

p_irf <- p_irf +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x_min, x_max), breaks = x_breaks) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())

p_timeline <- p_timeline +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(x_min, x_max), breaks = x_breaks)

p_final <- p_irf / p_timeline + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 0.5))


ggsave(filename = paste0("figures/irfs_events_", mycountry, ".png"), plot = p_final,
       dpi = 300)

p_final
```





# IRF per country



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
country_covars <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_maxwind      = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated         = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc     = mean(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

irfs_covars <- irfs_country %>%
  left_join(country_covars, by = "countrycode")

irfs_covars_min <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    min_irf = min(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_irf = max(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#get recovery time from irf going back to 0 after going negative
recovery_time <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  summarise(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf < 0), min(horizon[irf < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf < 0) & any(irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ lp_horizon, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop",
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

mod <- lm(min_irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars_min, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

mod <- lm(max_irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars_min, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

# recovery tine

mod <- lm(recovery_time ~ mean_maxwind*n_treated*avg_loggdp_pc, data = recovery_time, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

irfs_long <- irfs_covars %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_maxwind, n_treated, avg_loggdp_pc),
    names_to = "covariate",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(irfs_long,
       aes(x = value, y = irf)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T) +
  facet_grid(horizon~covariate , scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "IRF"
  ) +
  #print pearson correlation in each facet
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) 

mod <- lm(irf ~ as.factor(horizon):mean_maxwind + as.factor(horizon):n_treated + as.factor(horizon):avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
summary(mod) %>% print()
```





# Misc




```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


shock_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~var, ~label, ~dataset,
  "maxwind_treat",        "Wind treatment",           data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat",   "Wind per sqkm treatment",  data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind_shock",        "Wind shock",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_shock",   "Wind per sqkm shock",      data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind",              "Wind speed",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm",         "Wind speed per sqkm",      data_cc_sqkm
)


run_lp <- function(var, label, dataset) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = dataset,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = label)
}

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(shock_map, run_lp)


ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  # x-axis integer by 2
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, lp_horizon, by = 2)) +
  
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
ggsave("figures/irf_all_shocks.png", dpi = 300)

```







```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_treat = "Maximum Wind Speed",
  nlands_treat = "Number of Landfalls",
  energy_treat = "Storm Energy")

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```





```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "maxwind_shock",
    "nlands_sqkm_treat",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock",
    "nlands_treat",
    "nlands_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind treatment",
    "Wind per sqkm shock",
    "Wind per sqkm treatment",
    "Wind shock",
    "Landfalls per sqkm treat",
    "Landfalls per sqkm shock",
    "Landfalls treatment",
    "Landfalls shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```

# Raw vs residualized

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "wind_cat1",
    "wind_cat3"
    
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "Tropical Cyclone (Cat1+)",
    "Tropical Cyclone (Cat3+)"
    
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, message=FALSE}
shocks <- c(
  "maxwind_95",
  "maxwind_treat",
  "maxwind_sqkm_95",
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat"
)

irfs_all <- shocks %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = "loggdp",
      main_var = .x,
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(term = .x)
  )

df_plot <- irfs_all %>%
  mutate(
    panel = ifelse(grepl("sqkm", term), "Max wind per sqkm", "Max wind"),
    type  = ifelse(grepl("treat", term), "Residualized", "Raw")
  )

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = type),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = type, linetype = type),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Raw" = "solid", "Residualized" = "dotdash")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top"
  )

```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "tfp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```


# Continent

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  #geom_ribbon(
  #  aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #  alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  #) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  # Zero line (softer)
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, color = "grey40") +
  
  # Confidence band (optional, looks nice if you turn it back on)
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.15,
  #   color = NA
  # ) +
  
  # Main IRF lines
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Continent",
    fill  = "Continent"
  ) +
  
  # Percent axis with cleaner formatting
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  
  # Wrap legend into multiple rows
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_continent.png", dpi = 300)
```




```{r}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "countrycode"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    #controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","DOM","PHL"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  # ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "countrycode"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","DOM","PHL"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  # ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Country",
    fill = "Country"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_country.png", dpi = 300)
```



# TFP

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
outcomes <- c("loggdp", "tfp")

irfs_all <- outcomes %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = .x,
      main_var = "maxwind_treat",
      #controls =paste0( "l(", .x, ",2)"),
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(outcome = .x)
  )
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = outcome),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = outcome, linetype = outcome),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = "solid", "tfp" = "dotdash"),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```



```{r}

lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
shock_var   <- "maxwind_treat"

run_lp <- function(outcome_name) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = outcome_name,
    main_var     = shock_var,
    interact_var = lp_interact,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    #controls    =paste0("l(", outcome_name, ",2)")
  ) %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_name)
}


irfs_all <- c("loggdp", "tfp") %>% map_dfr(run_lp)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_blank(),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = "top"
  )
```



# Is it shaped by rich/poor

```{r}
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- left_join(world, data_tc, by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = credit_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Blues",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "Domestic credit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_group),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
) 

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "GDP group",
    fill = "GDP group"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_gdp_pc_groups_wind.png", dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
) %>% filter(shock =="1/20y Wind speed")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "GDP group",
    fill = "GDP group"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```






```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "credit_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_group"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```


# ROBUSTNESS

```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
controls <-c("0", "l(gdp_diff,1:2)", "l(gdp_diff,1:4)")

irfs_all <- controls %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = "loggdp",
      main_var = "maxwind_treat",
      controls = .x,
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(control = .x)
  )
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = control),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = control, linetype = control),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +


  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
irf_ols <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  interact_var = "period"
)

irf_iv <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  interact_var = "period",
  controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year

)

irfs_all <- bind_rows(
  irf_ols %>% mutate(type = "Main"),
  irf_iv  %>% mutate(type = "Lag-augmented")
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category, linetype = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ type) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Period", fill = "Period", linetype = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```






```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
shocks <- c("maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_year")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 12,
    #controls="l(loggdp,2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)


# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_treatment.png", dpi = 300)
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = "maxwind_treat",
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = main_var
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "0",
    "l(gdp_diff,2)",
    "l(gdp_diff,2:5)",
    "l(gdp_diff,2:10)"
  ),
  label = c(
    "None",
    "1 lag of dGDP ",
    "4 lags of dGDP",
    "9 lags of dGDP"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  ylim(-0.07,0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
interact_map <- tibble::tibble(
  interact_var = c("period90", "period91", "period92", "period89", "period88"),
  interact_lbl = c("1990", "1991", "1992", "1989", "1988")
)
run_lp <- function(data, interact_var, interact_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = "maxwind_treat",
    interact_var  = interact_var,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = NULL
  ) %>%
    mutate(interaction = interact_label)
}
irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(interact_map$interact_var, interact_map$interact_lbl),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)
ggplot(irfs_all,
       aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean,
           color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ interaction, ncol = 5) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill  = "Period"
  ) +
  
  ylim(-0.07, 0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(loggdp,2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    #controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "nlands_sqkm_treat",
    "energy_treat",
    "energy_sqkm_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind speed",
    "Wind speed / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  ylim(-0.07,0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_measure.png", dpi = 300)

```




```{r, message=FALSE}

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL

# ----------------------------
# Full-sample IRF
# ----------------------------
irf_full <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = lp_outcome,
  main_var = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon = lp_horizon,
  controls = lp_controls,
  fe = lp_fe,
  panel_id = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
) %>%
  mutate(
    loo_type = "Full sample",
    left_out = NA_character_
  )

# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-country-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_country <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$countrycode) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      controls = lp_controls,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country", left_out = .y)
  })

# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-year-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_year <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$year) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(year != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      controls = lp_controls,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year", left_out = .y)
  })

# ----------------------------
# Combine all for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot_df <- bind_rows(irf_full, loo_country, loo_year) %>%
  mutate(loo_type = factor(loo_type, levels = c("Leave-one-country", "Leave-one-year", "Full sample")))


```

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# ----------------------------
# Separate dataframes
# ----------------------------

# Full-sample IRFs
full_sample <- irf_plot_df %>% filter(loo_type == "Full sample")

# LOO by country
loo_country <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-country") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# LOO by year
loo_year <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-year") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# ----------------------------
# Plot function
# ----------------------------
plot_loo <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df) +
    # Full-sample IRFs (colored ribbons + lines)
    geom_ribbon(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
      alpha = 0.2, color = NA
    ) +
    
      # LOO IRFs (thin black lines)
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(!is.na(left_out)),
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, group = interaction(left_out, category)),
      color = "black",
      size = 0.2,
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
      size = 1.3
    ) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
    labs(
      x = "Horizon (years)",
      y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
      title = title,
      color = "Period",
      fill  = "Period"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top"
    )
}

# ----------------------------
# Generate plots
# ----------------------------
p_loo_country <- plot_loo(loo_country, "")
p_loo_year    <- plot_loo(loo_year, "")

# Display
p_loo_country
ggsave("figures/robust_loo_country.png", plot = p_loo_country, dpi = 300)
p_loo_year
ggsave("figures/robust_loo_year.png", plot = p_loo_year, dpi = 300)
```


```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL

fe_specs <- tibble(
  fe_label = c("Country + Year + Quad. Trend", " Country + Year + Lin. Trend", "Country + Year + ContinentxYear + Quad. Trend"),
  fe_var   = c("countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
               "countrycode[year] + year",
               "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + continent^year")
)

shock_map <- tibble(
  main_var   = "maxwind_treat",
  shock_label = "1/20y Wind speed"
)

run_lp_fe <- function(fe_var, fe_label) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data_tc,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = shock_map$main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = fe_var,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(fe_label = fe_label)
}


irfs_all <- fe_specs %>%
  pmap_dfr(~ run_lp_fe(..2, ..1))  # ..1 = fe_label, ..2 = fe_var

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ fe_label, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_fe.png", dpi = 300)
```



```{r, message=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run main IRF (DK SE)
# ----------------------------
irf_dk <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  controls      = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula  = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "DK")

# ----------------------------
# Run IRF with clustered SEs (no fill)
# ----------------------------
irf_cluster <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  controls      = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula  = cluster ~ countrycode +year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "Clustered")

# ----------------------------
# Combine for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot <- bind_rows(
  irf_dk,
  irf_cluster
)

# ----------------------------
# Plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot() +
  # DK ribbon (filled)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "DK"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  # Clustered CI (no fill, black line)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "Clustered"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category),
    fill = NA, linetype = "dashed", size = 1
  ) +
  # Mean line (from DK)
  geom_line(
    data = irf_dk,
    aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
    size = 1.1
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = " GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave("figures/robust_se.png", dpi = 300)
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 8
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year <= 1984, "1970-1984", ifelse(year <=1999, "1985-1999", "2000-2014"))) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/robust_period.png", dpi = 300)

```


```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5,message=FALSE}
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 8
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(decade = case_when(
    year >= 1970 & year <= 1979 ~ "1970s",
    year >= 1980 & year <= 1989 ~ "1980s",
    year >= 1990 & year <= 1999 ~ "1990s",
    year >= 2000 & year <= 2009 ~ "2000s",
    year >= 2010 & year <= 2019 ~ "2010s"
  )) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(decade)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/robust_decade.png", dpi = 300)

```



# MAPS

```{r}

data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = " Max Wind Speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_maxwind.png", width = 8, height = 5)


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(n_landfalls = mean(nlands, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = n_landfalls), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        0,
        min(data_tc_filtered$nlands[data_tc_filtered$nlands > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc_filtered$nlands, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# Landfalls"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_nlandfalls.png", width = 8, height = 5)


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(gdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = gdp), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        min(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
       #labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1), # <-- display as %
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "log GDP pc"
  ) +
  #robinson proj
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_gdp.png", width = 8, height = 5)


```



# R2 per Horizon

```{r, message=FALSE}
results <- list()
for (h in 0:10) {

  m_base <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ 
      maxwind_shock + l(gdp_diff, 1:2) |
      countrycode[year] + year,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )

  m_y2 <- update(m_base, . ~ . | . + countrycode[year2])
  m_y3 <- update(m_base, . ~ . | . + countrycode[year3])

  results[[h + 1]] <- tibble(
```
