```{r, message=FALSE}
    horizon = h,
    model   = c("Linear", "Poly2", "Poly3"),
    r2      = c(as.numeric(fitstat(m_base, "cor2")),
                as.numeric(fitstat(m_y2, "cor2")),
                as.numeric(fitstat(m_y3, "r2"))),
    aic     = c(AIC(m_base), AIC(m_y2), AIC(m_y3)),
    bic     = c(BIC(m_base), BIC(m_y2), BIC(m_y3))
  )
}
model_comp <- bind_rows(results)
model_comp_wide <- model_comp %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = horizon,
    names_from = model,
    values_from = c(r2, aic, bic),
    names_glue = "{model}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  arrange(horizon)

model_comp_wide
```





# Maps of Damages and Recovery


```{r}

data_tclags <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_treat_l0 = maxwind_treat,
    maxwind_treat_l1 = lag(maxwind_treat, 1),
    maxwind_treat_l2 = lag(maxwind_treat, 2),
    maxwind_treat_l3 = lag(maxwind_treat, 3),
    maxwind_treat_l4 = lag(maxwind_treat, 4),
    maxwind_treat_l5 = lag(maxwind_treat, 5),
    maxwind_treat_l6 = lag(maxwind_treat, 6),
    maxwind_treat_l7 = lag(maxwind_treat, 7),
    maxwind_treat_l8 = lag(maxwind_treat, 8),
    maxwind_treat_l9 = lag(maxwind_treat, 9),
    maxwind_treat_l10 = lag(maxwind_treat, 10)) %>% 
  ungroup()

dl_model <- feols(
  loggdp ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l0) + 
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l1) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l2) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l3) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l4) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l5) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l6) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l7) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l8) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l9) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l10)  | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tclags,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov = DK ~ year
)

coef_df <- data.frame(
  term     = names(coef(dl_model)),
  estimate = coef(dl_model)
) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
  mutate(
    country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):")[, 2],
    lag     = as.integer(str_match(term, "maxwind_treat_l([0-9]+)")[, 2])
  ) %>%
  arrange(country, lag)

irfs <- coef_df %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(lag) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = cumsum(estimate)   # IRF at each lag h
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(lag) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(lag[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & lag > min(lag[estimate < 0])),
      min(lag[estimate >= 0 & lag > min(lag[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H + 1, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

# define discrete colors
colors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")
breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = colors,
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(0, 12),
    labels  = labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "Years to Recovery",
    guide = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +  # Robinson projection
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_DL.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
H <- 10
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
      countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )
  
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)


irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(horizon[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])),
      min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ -1,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H + 1, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))


colors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")
breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")


ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = colors,
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(0, 12),
    labels  = labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "Years to Recovery",
    guide = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +  # Robinson projection
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# Save figure
ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_LP.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```





```{r}
H <- 5  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,maxwind_treat)  | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

labels <- c(
  "-10%", "-7.5%", "-5%", "-2.5%", "0%",
  "2.5%", "5%", "7.5%", "10%"
)

breaks <- seq(-0.10, 0.10, by = 0.025)

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(-0.10, 0.10),
    labels  = labels,
    oob     = scales::squish,
    name    = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      ticks = TRUE,
      frame.colour = "black"
    )
  )

ggsave("figures/map_h5.png", dpi = 300)
```





```{r}

H <- 10 # horizon
irf_list <- list()

# Step 1: Estimate IRFs for each horizon
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat)  |
      countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Step 2: Combine into one data frame
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

# Step 3: Compute recovery time based on mean IRF crossing zero
irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(horizon[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])),
      min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ -1,  # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H+1,  # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 4: Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

world_joined <- world_joined %>%
  mutate(recovery_bin = case_when(
    is.na(recovery_time)        ~ NA_character_,
    recovery_time == H+1       ~ "Never recovers",
    recovery_time <= 0         ~ "0",
    recovery_time <= 5         ~ "1–5",
    recovery_time <= 10        ~ "6–10",
    recovery_time <= 15        ~ "11–15",
    recovery_time <= 20        ~ "16–20",
    TRUE                       ~ "20+"
  )) %>%
  mutate(recovery_bin = factor(
    recovery_bin,
    levels = c("0", "1–5", "6–10", "11–15", "16–20", "20+", "Never recovers")
  ))

cols <- c(
  "0"             = "#0b6f6b",   # dark teal

  "1–5"           = "#f1cc4e",   # strong yellow
  "6–10"          = "#f39c12",   # orange
  "11–15"         = "#e67e22",   # deep orange
  "16–20"         = "#d35400",   # red-orange
  "20+"           = "#8e2a1f",   # dark red

  "Never recovers"= "black"
)

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_bin), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = cols,
    name     = "Recovery time (years)",
    na.value = "grey80",
    drop     = FALSE
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",

    # Make legend slimmer
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.45, "cm"),

    # Give more room to the map
    plot.margin = margin(5, 20, 5, 5),

    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      ncol = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      keywidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      keyheight = unit(0.45, "cm")
    )
  )
ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time.png", dpi = 300)
```




# GLOBAL MICRO

```{r}
data_1deg <- read_csv("processed data/gdp_tc_0_5deg.csv") 

data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  mutate(
    year2 = year^2,
    latlon = paste0(lat, "_", lon)
  ) %>%
filter(
  is.finite(wind)
) %>% 
filter(!is.na(wind)) %>% 
  #drop 2020 and 2021 because of covid
filter(year <= 2019)

data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  mutate(
    wind_p90 = quantile(wind, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    wind_90 = ifelse(wind >= wind_p90, 1, 0),
    wind_10ms = ifelse(wind >= 10, 1, 0),
    wind_21ms = ifelse(wind >= 21, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1979,
  baseline_end   = 2020
) {

fe_model <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste0(var, " ~ 0 | latlon + year")),
  data    = data
)

  shock_name <- paste0(var, "_shock")
  treat_name <- paste0(var, "_treat")
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever")
  first_treat_name <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year")
  thresh_name <- paste0(shock_name, "_p")

  data[[shock_name]] <- resid(fe_model)

  # 🔹 GLOBAL threshold across all countries (baseline window only)
  global_thresh <- quantile(
    data[[shock_name]][
      data$year >= baseline_start & data$year <= baseline_end
    ],
    p,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  data <- data %>%
    group_by(latlon) %>%
    mutate(

      # same threshold for everyone
      !!thresh_name := global_thresh,

      # treatment defined using global threshold
      !!treat_name := as.integer(
        .data[[shock_name]] >= global_thresh
      ),

      # zero out if underlying variable is zero
      !!treat_name := ifelse(.data[[var]] > 0, .data[[treat_name]], 0),

      # first treatment year
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1),
        min(year[.data[[treat_name]] == 1]),
        NA_real_
      ),

      # treat forever
      !!treat_forever_name := as.integer(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) &
          year >= .data[[first_treat_name]]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(data)
}



data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
 make_shock("wind")
```




```{r}
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "wind_treat",
  lags = 0:3,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500),
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
) %>% mutate(type = "Distributed Lag")

irfs_wind_lp <- lp_panel(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "wind_treat",
  horizon = 3,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year ",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500)
) %>% mutate(type = "Local Projection")

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(irfs_wind_cumulative, irfs_wind_lp)


# Plot both as a facet
ggplot(irfs_combined, aes(x = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lag, horizon), 
                          y = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", cumulative_effect, irf_mean))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = 'cornflowerblue') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lower_ci, irf_down), 
                  ymax = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", upper_ci, irf_up)), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = 'cornflowerblue', color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(x = "Years after Treatment",
       y = "Effect on Income Growth",
       title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on Income Growth") +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
```



```{r}
est1 <- feols(
  growth ~ poly(wind_treat,2,raw=TRUE)| latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year  ,
  data = data_1deg, panel.id = c("latlon", "year")
)
summary(est1, vcov = conley(cutoff=500))

f <- useful::predict_poly(est1, "wind", min = 0, max = 20, ref = 0, 
                           xvar_name = "wind", ci_level = 95)


# Plot
ggplot(f, aes(x = wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) 
```


```{r}
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 3
lp_fe       <- "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("latlon", "year")
lp_vcov     <- conley(cutoff=500)
lp_interact <- "country"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "wind",
    "wind_10ms"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind speed",
    "wind >10 ms"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_1deg 
) %>% filter(category %in% c("USA", "PHL", "MOZ","JPN"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
```


# MACRO VS MICRO MAPS



```{r}
fe_lag0 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,0) - l(loggdp,1) ~ i(country, wind_treat) |
    latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year,
  data = data_1deg,
  panel.id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov = conley(cutoff = 500)
)

# ---------------------------
# EXTRACT COUNTRY COEFFICIENTS
# ---------------------------
coef_country <- tidy(fe_lag0) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, ":wind_treat$")) %>%
  mutate(
    iso_a3 = str_remove(term, ":wind_treat$") ,
    
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
    iso_a3 = sub("^country::", "", iso_a3)
  ) %>%
  select(iso_a3, estimate)

# ---------------------------
# JOIN WITH WORLD MAP
# ---------------------------
world_joined <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
) %>%
  left_join(coef_country, by = "iso_a3")

# ---------------------------
# MAP
# ---------------------------
ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    limits  = c(-0.02, 0.02),
    breaks  = seq(-0.02, 0.02, by = 0.005),
    labels  = percent_format(accuracy = 0.5),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  #robinson
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  )

```


```{r}
fe_lag0 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,0) - l(loggdp,1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
    countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov = DK ~ year
)

# ---------------------------
# EXTRACT COUNTRY COEFFICIENTS
# ---------------------------
coef_country <- tidy(fe_lag0) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, ":maxwind_treat$")) %>%
  mutate(
    iso_a3 = str_remove(term, ":maxwind_treat$") ,
    
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
    iso_a3 = sub("^countrycode::", "", iso_a3)
  ) %>%
  select(iso_a3, estimate)

# ---------------------------
# JOIN WITH WORLD MAP
# ---------------------------
world_joined <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
) %>%
  left_join(coef_country, by = "iso_a3")

# ---------------------------
# MAP
# ---------------------------
ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    limits  = c(-0.02, 0.02),
    breaks  = seq(-0.02, 0.02, by = 0.005),
    labels  = percent_format(accuracy = 0.5),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
   coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  )
```
